closed_or_rejected_axes_checked.axis: UserKNN gated residual fine-grid and smoke
closed_or_rejected_axes_checked.evidence: Expected fine-grid reports are absent; prior logs show repeated invalid-divide warnings and no metric report. Previous smoke top mean delta +0.000900, min +0.000200, 3/3 positive, fixes/breaks 406/352, pooled p=0.05415: below strict mean and p gates.
Smoke best mean delta +0.0003667, min -0.0012002, 2/3 positive, fixes/breaks 252/230, p=0.3388. Expanded probe has no metric report and is classified failed/incomplete.

State records negative public transfer for rankblend residual, boundary scoreblend, frontier, and TAG-CF variants versus current 0.77825 public best; Hermes rejected iterations 03-04 for quarantine conflict.
DNS pool=1 is split-specific/public-noise risk; emb192/capacity/frontier rows are marginal and public-tested variants did not beat current best.

ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.axis: A genuinely new validation-label-free base model family trained from scratch
ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.why_not_launched_now: No implemented local surface is both fresh and credible; starting a new family here would likely exceed the bounded iteration or produce an underpowered one-split blip.
This would be script hygiene rather than an independent improvement axis, and the family is explicitly stalled/closed without a materially new design.
Existing disagreement/margin surfaces collapse into jackknife, boundary/frontier, rankblend, or capacity families that are closed or quarantined.
